title: Handheld Vacuum Cleaner, 22000Pa Car Vacuum Cleaner Cordless Powerful with 2-in-1 Suction and Blower Function, Car Hoovers Cordless Powerful for Office, Home Kitchen
features: 【Powerful 22000Pa Suction】 - Our JEMORA hand held vacuum cordless delivers an ultra-strong 22000Pa suction force on max mode, effortlessly lifting dirt, crumbs, and pet hair from carpets, sofas, and car seats. With 3 adjustable suction levels (12000Pa for delicate surfaces, 17000Pa for daily cleaning, and 22000Pa for deep cleaning), it tackles any mess with precision. The upgraded brushless motor in the car hoover ensures consistent, high-performance suction—making it the most versatile handheld vacuum cleaner for homes, offices, car and travel.

【4-in-1 Multi-Function Handheld Cordless Vacuum Cleaner】 – Go beyond cleaning with suck, blow, inflate, and pump versatility! The JEMORA cordless handheld vacuum effortlessly switches between removing stubborn dirt, blowing away debris from keyboards, inflating airbeds for camping, and pumping up balloons for parties—all in one compact device. Perfect for quick home cleanups, car detailing, travel essentials, and emergency fixes, it eliminates the need for multiple gadgets.

【Powerful 6000mAh Cordless Cleaning】 – The JEMORA car vacuum cleaner cordless is equipped with 3 high-performance 2000mAh built-in lithium-ion batteries, delivering a combined 6000mAh capacity for extended cordless cleaning. Enjoy consistent suction on a single charge—perfect for quick spills, pet hair, car interiors, and hard-to-reach corners.

【Smart Display & Runtime Guide – Always in Control!】- The JEMORA hand held vacuum cordless features a clear LED battery indicator (3 white bars) and real-time suction level display, so you’ll never run out of power unexpectedly. Choose between 3 customizable modes: 1. Eco Mode (12,000Pa) 2. Mid Mode (17,000Pa)3. Max Mode (22,000Pa) --- Plan your cleaning efficiently—no more guessing games with battery life!

【One-Touch Dust Emptying – A Revolutionary No-Mess Design!】- Say goodbye to messy cleanups with JEMORA's innovative cordless car vacuum cleaner. Simply press the release button, and the dust cup automatically opens—letting you empty debris directly into the bin without touching dirt or removing filters. No disassembly, no dirty hands, just quick and hygienic maintenance for hassle-free cleaning every time!

【Built-in LED Light - Illuminates Every Hidden Mess!】- Tired of missing dust in dark corners? The JEMORA handheld cordless vacuum cleaner and car hoover features a bright LED light right above the power button, spotting hidden debris under furniture, inside car seats, or in dimly lit closets. No more guessing—see and suck up every crumb, pet hair, and dust bunny with precision cleaning, day or night!

【Premium Complete Kit - Everything You Need for Professional-Grade Cleaning】- Elevate your cleaning experience with JEMORA's luxury handheld cordless car vacuum cleaner , featuring: 1x hand held vacuum cordless for ergonomic comfort and power, 3 x high-efficiency filters (1 installed + 2 spare) , 8 x Specialized Attachments for every surface type, 1x type-c charging cable, 1x detailed user manual.
description: Product Description JEMORA HANDHELD VACUUM CLEANER Say goodbye to hard-to-reach messes. This sleek hand held vacuum cordless is engineered for tight spaces and quick turnarounds—whether it’s under car seats, between cushions, or around consoles. Built to be as portable as it is powerful, it’s your go-to tool for a cleaner, more comfortable drive. Smart Design Meets Everyday Convenience This compact car vacuum cleaner is thoughtfully built for your daily needs. Its featherlight design and compact body make it easy to carry, store, and use - anywhere. Empty the dustbin with a single press, and enjoy peace of mind with three reusable filters included. No fuss, no mess, just efficient cleaning at your fingertips. Intuitive Controls. Smarter Cleaning. Designed to simplify your cleaning experience, this handheld vacuum cleaner cordless puts control right at your fingertips. Instantly check battery life and suction mode with the clear LED indicators. The universal Type-C charging port ensures fast, convenient power-ups, while the built-in light helps you spot every speck of dust—even in low-light spaces. Snap. Rinse. Done. Maintaining your car vacuum cleaner shouldn’t be a chore. With a detachable dustbin and washable filters, you can easily keep it clean and ready for the next job—no extra filters to buy, no complicated steps. Durable. Reusable. Designed to simplify your life. From Blowing to Vacuum Sealing, Attachments for Every Job This car vacuum cleaner comes with a full range of multi-function attachments to handle it all—blow away dust, vacuum up debris, seal storage bags, inflate air beds, and more. Each nozzle can be paired with different brushes to tackle narrow gaps, delicate surfaces, and hard-to-reach spots with ease. One device, countless ways to keep every space spotless. KEY FEATURES Combines vacuuming and blowing in one compact car vacuum cleaner Lightweight design for easy use in cars, home, or office Washable, reusable filters for long-term, eco-friendly performance Clear LED battery and mode display for precise control Multiple attachments for a wide range of cleaning tasks Built-in LED light for better visibility in dark areas Dust Disposal: One-touch emptying design for quick, hygienic cleaning PRODUCT DETAILS Colour: Black with Purple Accents Function: 2-in-1 Suction & Blowing Suction Power: Up to 22,000Pa with 3 adjustable levels (Eco 12,000Pa – Mid 17,000Pa – Max 22,000Pa) Battery: 6000mAh rechargeable lithium-ion battery Charging Port: Type-C fast charging Run Time: 20–40 minutes depending on suction level Dust Disposal: One-touch emptying design for quick, hygienic cleaning Filters: 3 washable & reusable filters (1 pre-installed) Display: LED indicators for battery level and suction mode Package Includes 1 × Car Vacuum Cleaner (Suction & Blowing) 1 × Type-C Charging Cable 1 × Extension Tube 3 × Washable Filters (1 pre-installed) 9 × Nozzles & Accessories for multiple cleaning scenarios

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Powerful Suction, 4-in-1 Multi-Functionality, One-Touch Dust Emptying, Built-in LED Light
